author: vincent18893
content:
I am a full-stack engineer specializing in integrating AI models into scalable, production-ready applications, with a focus on healthcare and the music industry. I build end-to-end systems that connect LLMs and multimodal models with robust APIs, data pipelines, and user-facing platforms.
My work includes developing privacy-aware healthcare solutions and AI-driven music and audio experiences. I focus on delivering reliable, real-world systems where AI is a core part of the product, not just a prototype.
